entry.data:
CLOUDY
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE LOWER 40S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

CLOUDY
SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE AROUND 40
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A 50 PERCENT CHANCE OF SHOWERS
NOT AS COOL WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
NOT AS COOL WITH LOWS IN THE MID 50S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS LIKELY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A 40 PERCENT CHANCE OF SHOWERS
LOWS AROUND 50
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
